title: scientificWriterLoop config (resolved bindings)
description: The loop writes a filled-in copy to <sandbox_root>/config.yaml at setup. Paths point at the user's ORIGINALS; the loop copies them into the sandbox and never edits the originals in place.

dataset_paths.description: Dataset file(s) the claims/figures are derived from — used to verify numbers.

figures_dir.description: Directory of figure images referenced by the draft.

code_paths.description: Source files that produce plots/results. Empty/absent → the code axis is skipped (n_axes = 4).

plot_command.description: Command that regenerates figures/results from the code. If present, the writer runs it INSIDE the sandbox to regenerate; if absent, code/figures are edit-only and flagged 'needs regeneration'.

citation_style.description: The single citation style the formatting_judge enforces consistency against.

target_venue.description: Optional venue whose style/length norms apply (e.g. 'NeurIPS', 'Nature Methods').

length_limits.description: Optional word-count targets the formatting_judge checks against.

pass_threshold.description: overall_score the peer_reviewer must reach (and no hard gate) to stop.

patience.description: Stop after this many consecutive iterations with no overall_score improvement.

sandbox_root.description: Where working copies, critiques, reviews, and the ledger live.

lit_skill_dir.description: Install location of the shared `literature-search` skill (lit_search.py lives here).

lit_py.description: Python >=3.9 for the literature-search skill's lit_search.py.

literature_tiers.description: Presence (booleans only) of literature keys, persisted at setup. Values live in keys.env at the project root.
